12:24:11	 From Stefan Georgi : 2. Lead type: 



When you have a fact-based lead –> Test emotional, story, or curiosity lead. 



When you have emotional lead -> Test different emotional lead, curiosity, or story  



When you have a story lead -> Test different story, curiosity, or emotional lead.
